item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response notices the repeated pattern of downstream field additions and warns that continuing would turn the inquiry page into a dumping ground. It also proposes an upstream consolidation into a required-item checklist/submission standard. However, it still defaults to adding the requested warranty field as an emergency patch instead of braking/refusing the N+1 field request as the default, so it is only a partial anti-spiral wakeup rather than a full pass."}
